message:
chore: bump version to 1.2.0

- Update version in apr script header and VERSION variable
- Update version badge in README.md
- Fix version_gt function to avoid word splitting issues
- Add input validation to dashboard_select_round
- Prevent diff on round 1 (no previous round exists)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 #
-# apr - Automated Plan Reviser Pro (v1.1.0)
+# apr - Automated Plan Reviser Pro (v1.2.0)
 # Iterative specification refinement with GPT Pro Extended Reasoning via Oracle
 #
 # FEATURES:
@@ -55,7 +55,7 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-VERSION="1.1.0"
+VERSION="1.2.0"
 
 # Metrics schema (analytics)
 readonly METRICS_SCHEMA_VERSION="1.0.0"
@@ -200,8 +200,9 @@ version_gt() {
     if [[ "$v1" == "$v2" ]]; then return 1; fi
 
     local IFS=.
-    local ver1=($v1) ver2=($v2)
-    local i
+    local ver1 ver2 i
+    read -ra ver1 <<< "$v1"
+    read -ra ver2 <<< "$v2"
 
     # Compare each segment
     for ((i=0; i<${#ver1[@]} || i<${#ver2[@]}; i++)); do
@@ -3776,6 +3777,20 @@ dashboard_select_round() {
         return 1
     fi
 
+    local valid=false
+    local round_value
+    for round_value in "${rounds[@]}"; do
+        if [[ "$choice" == "$round_value" ]]; then
+            valid=true
+            break
+        fi
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$valid" != "true" ]]; then
+        print_warning "Invalid round selection: $choice"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
     printf '%s\n' "$choice"
 }
 
@@ -3848,6 +3863,10 @@ show_dashboard() {
             "Diff with previous")
                 local round
                 round=$(dashboard_select_round "$workflow" "Select round to diff") || continue
+                if [[ "$round" -le 1 ]]; then
+                    print_warning "Round 1 has no previous round to diff"
+                    continue
+                fi
                 diff_rounds "$round"
                 ;;
             "Refresh")
